name: Szechuan Beef or Pork
recipeIngredient: 1 or 2 green peppers, cut into 1/8 inch strips
1 or 2 carrots, finely shredded into 1/8 inch match-stick size strips
1 scallion, quartered lengthwise and then into 3-inch long strips
1 pound beef (round, chuck, or pork loin), cut into fine strips (1/8 inch by 2 to 3 inches long)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok and stir-fry the green peppers, carrots, and scallion for 1-2 minutes.
2. Push aside and stir-fry the slivers of meat for 1 to 2 minutes.
3. Recombine with the vegetables and add the remaining ingredients.
4. Stir and heat thoroughly. Serve immediately with boiled rice.
5. Serves 4. I usually double the sauce ingredients because it doesn't seem to be quite enough.
